oneCourse.description: One course lunch — choose from the following.

items.name: Lamb Seekh Kebab Roll
items.description: Minced lamb and chicken with onion and pepper served wrapped in thin Indian bread.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Kathi Roll
items.description: Chicken tikka tempered with julienne of vegetables wrapped in thin Indian bread.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken Tikka
items.description: Marinated chicken tikka cooked in the clay oven accompanied with mint chutney.

items.name: Paneer Kathi Roll
items.description: Homemade cottage cheese wrapped in thin Indian bread with spicy mint chutney on the side.

items.name: Chicken Karahi
items.description: Cooked with onion, pepper and tomatoes. Served with steamed rice or plain naan.

items.name: Chicken Korma
items.description: Chicken breast with tomato, onion, almond and coconut with a touch of cream. Served with steamed rice or plain naan.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Charcoal-grilled chicken tikka cooked with tomato, onions, cashew nuts and cream. Served with steamed rice or plain naan.

items.name: Lamb Jalfrezi
items.description: Julienne of ginger, tomato and bell peppers in a tangy sauce. Served with steamed rice or plain naan.

items.name: Old School Lamb Curry
items.description: Slow cooked lamb with onion, tomato, ginger, garlic and made with lots of love! Served with steamed rice or plain naan.

items.name: Paneer Kadhai
items.description: Homemade cottage cheese cooked with pepper, onion and tomato. Served with steamed rice or plain naan.

items.name: Dal Makhani
items.description: Black lentils cooked overnight with tomato, butter and cream. Served with steamed rice or plain naan.

twoCourse.description: Two course lunch including poppadoms & chutney.

starters.name: Vegetable Pakora
starters.description: Julienne of vegetables in a crisp batter coating with ground spices.

starters.name: Lamb Seekh Kebab
starters.description: Spiced mince chicken and lamb, cooked in the tandoor.

starters.name: Chicken Pakora
starters.description: Marinated chicken in a crisp gram flour batter.

starters.name: Aloo Chana Chaat
starters.description: Spiced potato and chickpea with a mint, tamarind and sweet chilli dressing. Served cold.

starters.name: Fish Pakora
starters.description: Marinated white fish in a crisp gram flour batter.

starters.name: Chicken Tikka
starters.description: Marinated with ginger, garlic and green chilli.

mains.name: Chicken Karahi
mains.description: Cooked with onion, pepper and tomatoes.

mains.name: Old School Lamb Curry
mains.description: Slow cooked lamb with onion, tomato, ginger, garlic and lots of love!

mains.name: Chicken Korma
mains.description: Chicken breast with tomato, onion, almond and coconut with a touch of cream.

mains.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
mains.description: Charcoal-grilled chicken tikka cooked with tomato, onions, cashew nuts and cream.

mains.name: Lamb Jalfrezi
mains.description: Julienne of ginger, tomato and bell peppers in a tangy sauce.

mains.name: Paneer Kadhai
mains.description: Homemade cottage cheese cooked with pepper, onion and tomato.

mains.name: Gobhi Aloo
mains.description: Cauliflower and potato cooked with a tomato based sauce.

mains.name: Dal Tarka
mains.description: Spiced yellow lentil tempered with onion, garlic and fresh coriander.
